scenes.title: Test Scene
scenes.action: A lone figure steps into a neon alley and looks up.

shots.prompt: [SHOT] Medium shot, 50mm f/1.8 lens, shallow depth of field, camera at waist level slightly below subject. [SCENE] A narrow neon-lit alley with reflective wet pavement, clear weather, natural lighting from neon signs, electric blue light with hints of pink casting from signs and reflections, subtle haze from distant city lights. [ACTION] The character steps cautiously into the alley, looking toward the camera, visible tension in body posture, deliberate steps on the slick surface. [OUTFIT] Black leather jacket with visible texture, slim jeans, worn brown boots. [QUALITY] Photorealistic, visible skin pores and subsurface scattering, shallow depth of field with circular bokeh, natural film grain ISO 400, micro-detail in fabric texture, no AI artifacts, no smooth plastic skin.
shots.scene_foley: Steady footsteps echoing softly in the alley
shots.action_context: The character cautiously enters the alley
shots.intent_notes: A lone figure steps into a neon alley and looks up.
shots.negative_constraints: blur, distort, deformed face, identity drift, off-model face, broken anatomy

shots.prompt: [SHOT] Close-up shot, 85mm f/1.8 lens, shallow depth of field, camera at shoulder level angled slightly upwards. [SCENE] A narrow neon-lit alley with reflective wet pavement, clear weather, natural lighting from neon signs, electric blue light with hints of pink casting from signs and reflections, subtle haze from distant city lights. [ACTION] The character stands just inside the alley, looking upward into the neon glow, expression tense and thoughtful, slight tilt of the head, static postural focus. [OUTFIT] Black leather jacket with visible wear, charcoal turtleneck, hints of moisture beads on leather. [QUALITY] Photorealistic, visible skin pores and subsurface scattering, shallow depth of field with circular bokeh, natural film grain ISO 400, micro-detail in fabric weave, no AI artifacts, no smooth plastic skin.
shots.scene_foley: Distant hum of neon lights and a faint dripping sound
shots.action_context: The character pauses, looking up into the light
shots.intent_notes: A lone figure steps into a neon alley and looks up.
shots.negative_constraints: blur, distort, deformed face, identity drift, off-model face, broken anatomy
